data.name: PhysHMR: Learning Humanoid Control Policies from Vision for Physically Plausible Human Motion Reconstruction

data.description: PhysHMR: Learning Humanoid Control Policies from Vision for Physically Plausible Human Motion Reconstruction discusses Whole-Body Control (WBC).
